title: UKG Payroll Modernization Held for Committee, Assessment Corrections, and Public Safety HQ Parking Lease
summary: Item 23 (Mosaic/UKG Pro payroll modernization contract) held for Finance Committee meeting to brief new council members on project history and trajectory. Item 24: Assessment corrections for properties at 1314 Spring Street and 112-14 BERT. Item 25: Lease of 100 parking spaces at Gettis Street shopping plaza for public safety headquarters relocation; council questions lot capacity and considers Corcoran High School as alternative. Item 26 introduced by Budget Director.

political_signal.description: Council holds Mosaic/UKG payroll modernization contract for committee briefing to ensure new members understand project history

processing_notes: Matt OJ likely a transcription artifact for Commissioner of Assessment name — not in entity registry
Item 23 later discussed at Finance Committee Feb 3 2026 (qUjV1ZYa2nY)
PS HQ relocation parking at Gettis St plaza — 100 spaces of ~200 available
